Improvement_Score.description: Ordinal scores assigned to the five response-to-treatment categories: (1) Marked improvement, (2) Moderate improvement, (3) Slight improvement, (4) Stationary, (5) Worse. Used as the ordered outcome variable in the chi-square test for trend.

High_Infiltration.description: Number of patients with high skin infiltration in each of the five improvement score categories. Part of the 2×5 contingency table; paired with Low_Infiltration across the same improvement categories.

Low_Infiltration.description: Number of patients with low skin infiltration in each of the five improvement score categories. Part of the 2×5 contingency table; paired with High_Infiltration across the same improvement categories.
